opportunity.title: Show HN: TopMail – LaunchFest Winner, $20/Mo Unlimited Email, Coding Agents API
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "coding agents" market is full of naive wrappers that just prepend instructions. The real challenge is managing tool call state across provider boundaries—if your routing logic doesn't persist tool outputs with semantic metadata, context windows explode within minutes. A practical approach: track tool invocation trees, not just message sequences, so you can reconstruct the decision graph for debugging and cost allocation.
actions.reasoning: I have built multi-provider LLM routing systems and coding agent toolchains that handle dynamic tool selection and context management across heterogeneous models.
